mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_addresses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_addresses(user_id, receiver, phone, region, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{region}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_addresses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_addresses SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
